selected_markets.title: Will the high temp in Chicago be <46° on Feb 14, 2026?
Will the **high temp in Austin** be 74-75° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Chicago February highs typically range 25-35°F. Mid-prob of 0.99 appears overconfident. Adjusting down for regression to historical mean and accounting for positive enrich_bias of 0.0408. High volume supports market efficiency but extreme probability warrants skepticism.

Austin February highs typically 60-70°F. A narrow band of 74-75°F is well above seasonal norms and unlikely. Mid-prob of 0.015 is reasonable but slightly too low given some tail risk of warm anomalies. Adjusting up modestly from mid-prob while maintaining low probability.
